commands: sh -c "pnpm exec cypress verify || pnpm exec cypress install"
pnpm exec cypress run --project apps/analog-app-e2e-cypress --config-file cypress.config.ts --config baseUrl=http://localhost:3000

options.command: start-server-and-test 'nx run analog-app:serve-nitro' http://localhost:3000 'nx run analog-app-e2e-cypress:cypress'
